description.ko: 신비로운 생명체들이 스스로 빛을 내어 어둠을 밝히는 바다의 가장 깊은 곳으로 떠나는 여정입니다.
description.en: A journey into the darkest reaches of the ocean where mysterious creatures light up the void with their own natural glow.

prompt: Cinematic wide shot of a deep-sea hydrothermal vent on the ocean floor, bioluminescent jellyfish floating in the dark abyss, neon cyan and violet glowing marine life, floating particles, high-detail textures, 8k resolution, ethereal atmosphere, abyss aesthetic.
